changes: Added atlasContinuationContractReason so continuation contracts distinguish ready_nodes_remain, exact_next_action_remains, and combined ready-node/action denial states.
ValidateAtlasRecommendationReadback now rejects stale continuation_contract.reason values when exact_next_action is the only remaining blocker.
Extended the lease-minutes-unmet regression to assert ready_nodes=0, final_response_allowed=false, continuation_required, and reason=exact_next_action_remains.
Production readiness now checks the generated completed-short readback for the exact-next-action-only continuation contract.
